lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear and tear on the upholstery. The engine is operational but requires regular maintenance.

Experience the thrill of a vehicle that is truly in showroom condition! This car has been meticulously cared for and is absolutely pristine, both inside and out. It looks and drives like it just came off the lot, offering a rare chance to own a vehicle in such flawless, mint condition. You won't find a single detail overlooked—this is perfection on wheels!
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint retains a strong shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a small, shallow scratch on the driver-side door. Inside, the leather upholstery is well-preserved with only light wear on the driver's bolster. Mechanically, the car is sound, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine. All electronics and features, including the climate control and infotainment system, are fully functional. It is a reliable and presentable vehicle that clearly shows pride of ownership.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows extensive wear, including deep scratches, several large dents, and visible rust on the lower body panels. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with some tears and staining. Mechanically, the car runs but suffers from a rough idle and a known transmission slip, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. It is being sold strictly as-is, making it an ideal candidate for a parts car or a dedicated project for someone with the right tools and expertise.
The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents, and the interior shows moderate wear. It is mechanically functional but requires some maintenance.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest standards. This specimen exhibits showroom-level preservation, featuring an unblemished exterior and an interior that remains in near-factory state. Meticulously inspected and mechanically flawless, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and peak performance.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s still looking absolutely pristine—just like it rolled off the lot! It drives like a dream and the interior is basically untouched. I'm really sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. It’s a total gem and ready for its next adventure!
This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered legend, featuring a high-revving 3.2L inline-six
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Garage kept. Clean title in hand.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive care with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior finish that is absolutely flawless, free of any swirl marks, chips, or imperfections. The interior is equally breathtaking, featuring premium leather surfaces that show zero signs of wear and a cabin that remains in factory-fresh condition. Mechanically, the car performs exactly as it did the day it was delivered, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history and exceptionally low mileage. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, every detail reflects a standard of excellence rarely seen on the pre-owned market. This is an exceptional find for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present this superlative example of automotive excellence, preserved in a state that truly defines showroom quality. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, presenting a flawless aesthetic and a mechanical profile that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery. With an interior devoid of wear and an exterior finish of mirror-like clarity, this specimen represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands peerless quality and uncompromising performance. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who accept nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, having been curated and maintained to the most exacting standards. The exterior finish retains its original factory luster, while the interior cabin is entirely devoid of wear, reflecting a life of climate-controlled preservation. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the absolute precision of a new unit. For the discerning buyer who demands excellence and an uncompromising ownership experience, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of the marque.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car has been pampered since day one and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s in such incredible shape, you won’t find a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere. I’ve taken such good care of it, and I’m looking for someone who will love it just as much as I do. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!
This pristine E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the S54 3.2L inline-six with high-pressure VAN
Used car. Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect. Service records available.

This vehicle is a remarkable time capsule, meticulously maintained with a level of care that borders on obsession. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory-fresh luster, entirely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or blemishes, having been shielded by a professional-grade ceramic coating and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery shows zero bolster wear, the original carpets are spotless, and the dashboard is free of any fading or sun damage. Every electronic feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the intricate seat adjustments, functions with crisp, factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history with every maintenance milestone performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships. The engine bay is immaculate, the undercarriage is clean, and the drive is tight, quiet, and responsive. This is a rare, collector-grade example that offers the same tactile experience as the day it first left the showroom floor.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Demonstrating an uncompromising standard of care, this unit features a flawless exterior profile complemented by an interior that remains in an untouched state. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision expected of a high-caliber investment. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unrivaled quality, suited for the most sophisticated automotive enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in truly impeccable condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in showroom state. Every component has been meticulously preserved to ensure a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's been garage-kept and babied since day one. You won’t find a single scratch or hiccup here. It’s ready for a new home where it’ll be just as loved. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!
Offering an exceptional E92 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. At its heart lies the S65 4.0L
Used car. Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect. Full service history available.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, preserved in showroom-ready condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained within a climate-controlled environment, showcasing a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. The interior remains pristine, featuring premium leather that still carries that new-car aroma, with every electronic component and luxury amenity functioning exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule documented by a complete set of service records. From the unblemished alloy wheels to the untouched undercarriage, this car represents the pinnacle of its class. It comes complete with all original manuals, two master keys, and a clean title. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this is the one.

Presenting an investment-grade vehicle of unparalleled caliber. This specimen has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserved in a state that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every surface, from the hand-finished exterior to the pristine cabin, reflects a commitment to automotive excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in superlative condition, catering to the most discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the most rigorous standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, featuring flawless exterior surfaces and an interior entirely devoid of wear. Mechanically, the unit is in peak operational status, supported by exhaustive service documentation. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance for the discerning collector.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total showstopper. This car is in such incredible shape that it basically looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, kept tucked away in a garage, and driven so gently you'd think it was brand new. You won't find a single scratch or dent on this beauty—it's truly flawless. It’s such a dream to drive and I’m genuinely sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely fall in love with it. Come check it out, you won't be disappointed!
Available is an impeccable 2004 BMW M3 (E46), a benchmark of naturally aspirated engineering. The S54B32 powerplant
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Service records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a vehicle that redefines the standard for 'mint' condition. This car has been meticulously garage-kept and pampered since day one, appearing as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks, complemented by pristine alloy wheels wrapped in high-performance tires. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of any wear or creasing, and the interior still carries that fresh, new-car aroma. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the bespoke premium audio system, functions perfectly. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, with a complete, documented service history from authorized dealerships ensuring peak performance and reliability. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a non-smoker, accident-free masterpiece that needs absolutely nothing but a new home.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and showing no discernible signs of wear, this motorcar represents the pinnacle of its class. The exterior finish remains flawless, complemented by an interior that retains its original factory luster. For the discerning enthusiast seeking a specimen of uncompromising quality and mechanical precision, this offering stands as an absolute benchmark.
